creator: jaapb@kerguelen.org
text:
Ocsigen has released its version 2, which contains a lot of improvements.

Most notably, the package has been split up into several parts: the ocsigen port now contains only the Web server, whereas the eliom programming framework has become a new package (I'll submit that separately).

Fix: A diff of the www/ocsigen port directory is attached.

Note that files/patch-Makefile has disappeared.

This port update depends on several other PRs: the ocaml-tyxml library in ports/163313 is a dependency, as well as the new version of ocaml-lwt in ports/163276 - and ocaml-lwt itself depends on ocaml-react, submitted in ports/156472.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
